section.heading: Pets on airplanes

subsection.heading: Prohibition.—
subsection.content: It shall be unlawful for any person to place a live animal in an overhead storage compartment of an aircraft operated under part 121 of title 14, Code of Federal Regulations.

subsection.heading: Civil Penalty.—
subsection.content: The Administrator may impose a civil penalty under section 46301 for each violation of this section.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 115–254, div. B, title IV, § 417(a), Oct. 5, 2018, 132 Stat. 3334.)
